content.description:
TREASURE HUNT is an exciting team-based game where participants follow a series of clues to reach the final treasure. The event tests participants’ logical thinking, coordination, time management, and teamwork.
Contact: UMASHANKAR - 9944845308

rules.rule: Team should consist of exactly 4 members.
Team members should stay together throughout the event.
Clues will be given one at a time and must be solved in sequence.
Teams must not damage, hide, or remove clues placed for other teams.
Seeking help from outsiders or other teams is strictly prohibited.
Any form of misconduct, cheating, or rule violation will lead todisqualification.
